tools.name: get_chains
tools.description:
Provides an up to date list of supported blockchain networks by Everstake and info about these chains: 
fees, aprs, supported currencies, active/inactive statuses, etc.

tools.name: get_company_profile
tools.description:
Complete company information for Everstake: overview, metrics, certifications, products, clients, and contact details.
Use when users need comprehensive facts about Everstake as a company.

tools.name: get_contact_information
tools.description:
Comprehensive contact information and routing guide for Everstake inquiries, including social media, company resources, and purpose-specific contact channels.
Use when users need to contact Everstake or find specific company resources.

tools.name: get_developer_docs
tools.description:
Comprehensive developer resources and integration documentation for Everstake's staking and yield infrastructure.
Use this tool when developers need SDK documentation, integration guides, API references, or technical implementation details.

tools.name: get_integrations
tools.description:
Comprehensive integration information for Everstake: custody platform integrations, wallet partnerships, and developer SDKs.
Use when users need details about integrating Everstake with existing platforms, custody solutions, or development frameworks.

tools.name: get_products
tools.description:
Detailed information about Everstake's product offerings: features, use cases, pricing, and technical specifications.
Use when users need specific product details for decision-making or integration planning.

tools.name: get_security_profile
tools.description:
Comprehensive security and compliance information for Everstake: certifications, audits, infrastructure security, and compliance standards.
Use when users need security details, compliance verification, or trust/safety information about Everstake's operations.

tools.name: get_solutions
tools.description:
Industry-specific solutions and integration approaches for different client segments: custodians, exchanges, asset managers, banks, and fintech.
Use when users need tailored solution guidance for their specific business type or integration scenario.

tools.name: get_uptime_metrics
tools.description: Provides uptime metrics for Everstake services.

tools.name: request_integration
tools.description:
Submit an integration or staking inquiry on behalf of a user. All submissions are routed to Everstake's sales team via Pipedrive CRM.
Use when a user expresses intent to integrate with Everstake, explore staking services, or request more information about products.

tools.name: staking_calculator
tools.description:
Interactive staking reward estimator. Provide a network and stake amount to receive estimated annual and monthly rewards based on current APY. Works only with networks provided by the get_chains tool.
Data freshness: APY rates updated daily. MUST HAVE either currency or chain set.
